title: UltraSingleBiome
description: A custom world generator for Minecraft servers, optimized for Crystal PvP with an automatic Desert biome world.
body:
### 📌 **UltraSingleBiome**  

# **UltraSingleBiome**  
_A custom world generator for Minecraft servers, optimized for **Crystal PvP** with an automatic **Single Biome** world._  

## 📜 **Features**  
- 🌍 **Auto-generates a "Dessert" world** (custom desert biome)  
- ⚡ **Optimized for Crystal PvP** with a flat yet structured terrain  
- ✅ **Supports multiple Minecraft versions** (1.16 - 1.21)  
- 🚀 **Lightweight & performance-friendly**  

## 📂 **Installation**  

### 🖥️ **For Server Owners**  
1. **Download the latest JAR** from [Releases](https://github.com/AkaTriggered/UltraSandBiome/releases)
2. Place it in your `plugins/` folder  
3. Restart your server  
4. The world named **"Dessert"** will auto-generate  
5. Use `/mv tp Dessert` (if using **Multiverse**)

🔓 This project is licensed under the **MIT License**.  

## 📞 **Support & Feedback**  
- Report issues on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/AkaTriggered/UltraSandBiome/issues/new/choose)
🚀 **Enjoy the best Crystal PvP world generation!**
